rule_text: AP Government promissory note / Municipal debenture / Port Trust bond securities furnished by contractors must be revalued ANNUALLY in May at lower-of-(market-price-on-1-May-of-year, face-value); if the securities' total value falls short of (required security + 5% buffer) by Rs.100 or more, the depositor must be called upon to furnish additional security; securities are only returnable if appreciation exceeds Rs.100 face value.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND SecurityForm IN [PromissoryNote, MunicipalDebenture, PortTrustBond]
verification_method: Check annual May valuation record; verify additional-security demand if shortfall; reject return of unappreciated securities

rule_text: AP Security Deposit must NOT be paid back / re-transferred / disposed of without special orders of competent authority OR strict adherence to terms of the security bond/agreement; departmental authority returning security must obtain depositor's signed-and-witnessed acknowledgment; percentage deduction from contractor's bills held as security under piece-work contract MUST NOT be refunded until final bills are prepared and passed.
verification_method: Check SD return is per agreement terms with witnessed acknowledgment; piece-work bill-deductions retained until final bill
